name: Founder vs. Board
description: A pattern of tension between a company's founder and its board of directors, escalating from private tension to public conflict and eventual resolution.

phases.name: Tension Signals
phases.description: Subtle signs of disagreement: strategic differences reported, unusual board meeting patterns, key allies departing, anonymous sources talking to media.

phases.name: Public Conflict
phases.description: The dispute becomes public: open letters, board votes, media campaigns, investor pressure. Both sides rally support.

phases.name: Resolution
phases.description: Resolution via founder ouster, board reconstitution, compromise power-sharing, or company restructuring.
